bugs.description: No cancelTimers() override. endGame() inlines clearTimeout+cancelAnimationFrame+removeEventListener×2. cleanup() duplicates the same three teardown calls instead of delegating. This diverges from the gold-standard pattern (cancelTimers override + cleanup calling super only) and creates duplicated teardown logic. No crash risk in current code because cleanup() does clear everything, but the duplication is a maintainability hazard.
bugs.fix: Introduce protected cancelTimers(): void { clearTimeout(this.endTimeout); cancelAnimationFrame(this.animFrame); this.canvas?.removeEventListener('pointerdown', this.onClick); this.canvas?.removeEventListener('keydown', this.onKeyDown); super.cancelTimers(); }. Then endGame() calls this.cancelTimers() and cleanup() calls only super.cleanup().

bugs.description: No cancelTimers() override. endGame() inlines cancelAnimationFrame+removeEventListener×2. cleanup() duplicates the same teardown instead of delegating to cancelTimers(). Same structural divergence from gold standard as CRS-01.
bugs.fix: Introduce protected cancelTimers(): void { cancelAnimationFrame(this.animFrame); this.canvas?.removeEventListener('pointerdown', this.onClick); this.canvas?.removeEventListener('keydown', this.onKeyDown); super.cancelTimers(); }. Then endGame() calls this.cancelTimers() and cleanup() calls only super.cleanup().

bugs.description: Completed-round score dots (lines 463-464) render a flat grey rgba(140,130,120,0.5) for all past rounds regardless of hit or miss. mg_course uses roundOutcomes[i] to color green (hit) vs red (miss). Echo never stores per-round outcomes, so there is no hit/miss color distinction. Players lose all feedback about which rounds they got right after the fact.
bugs.fix: Add a private roundOutcomes: boolean[] = [] field. Push outcome in onClick/onKeyDown/render timeout branch (same pattern as mg_course). In the dot rendering loop, use roundOutcomes[i] to choose green rgba(80,180,80,0.7) vs red rgba(200,60,60,0.5) for completed rounds.

priority_bugs.description: mg_course: no cancelTimers() override — teardown duplicated across endGame() and cleanup(). Diverges from gold-standard pattern.
priority_bugs.fix: Extract cancelTimers() override, have endGame() call this.cancelTimers(), have cleanup() call only super.cleanup().

priority_bugs.description: mg_echo: no cancelTimers() override — same structural duplication as CRS-01.
mg_echo: score dots for completed rounds are always grey — hit/miss outcome not tracked or visualized.
priority_bugs.fix: Add roundOutcomes: boolean[] array and drive dot color from it.
